summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Early Bird discount system (8% off for bookings 30+ days in advance). All features working correctly: indicator appears on Step 3, discount calculated correctly in Step 4 summary, and discount info included in booking confirmation message.
passed_tests: Booking form loads correctly on /book page
Step 1: Experience selection works (Self-Defense, Language, Visual Storytelling)
Step 3: Duration and date selection works
Early Bird indicator (green box with Gift icon) appears on Step 3 when selecting date 30+ days in future
Early Bird indicator shows 'Early Bird -8%' and 'Réservation 30+ jours à l'avance'
Self-Defense Weekend (€250): Early Bird discount €20, total €230 - CORRECT
Visual Storytelling Weekend (€350): Early Bird discount €28, total €322 - CORRECT
Language Course 1 week (€400 + €45 registration): Early Bird discount €32, price after €368, total €413 - CORRECT
Step 4 Summary shows: base price (crossed out), Early Bird discount (-8%), price after discount, and total
No Early Bird discount when date is less than 30 days away (tested with March 20, 2026)
Booking submission successful with Early Bird discount info in confirmation message
Database stores Early Bird discount details in booking message
seed_data_creation: None - test booking created with Early Bird discount
context_for_next_testing_agent: Early Bird discount system fully tested and working. EARLY_BIRD_DAYS = 30, EARLY_BIRD_DISCOUNT = 0.08 (8%). Discount is calculated as Math.round(price * EARLY_BIRD_DISCOUNT). The discount applies to base price only, not registration fees. Booking confirmation message includes Early Bird discount details.
mocked_api_note: All experience data is HARDCODED in /app/backend/server.py - no database used for experiences
